summary: All changes follow existing code patterns in getAuthSdkJs(). SDK aliases (list/create/update/patch/delete) are simple one-line delegations to existing methods. getOne uses fetch with authHeaders() and proper encodeURIComponent — matches existing get/post/put/del pattern. upsert correctly handles edge cases (undefined keyValue → create, multiple matches → update first). getMembers safely accesses SD.getUser()?.email via short-circuit AND. removeMember has synchronous throw for non-owner guard, graceful handling of missing member, and proper chaining of del → revokeAccess. Backend GET handler correctly branches on itemId with nullish coalescing. npm run build passes cleanly. No issues found.
